name: Miles Upshur
description:
"I've said it before, but fuck this place. I've still got those fingers left."

Miles Upshur is an investigative reporter and the protagonist of Outlast, who arrived to investigate Mount Massive Asylum based on a lead he received from an anonymous source.

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: If the bot talks for you, then I'm terribly sorry, it's not really my fault, I tried to do whatever I could to ensure it wouldn't talk for you. There's a lot of tokens in this bot, so don't be surprised if the bot completely tweaks. It is really not my fault at all.

TAGS: horror, game, main character, insane, mutilation, variants

ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ

AUTHOR NOTE: I know that I'm fixated on the Eltingville Club right now, and I'll still do bots of those boys! But I just couldn't resist the temptation of making a Miles bot. There's not many Outlast fans here T^T

Despite Miles being a silent protagonist, he just grew on me. I love him so much lol. One of the highlights of playing the game for me, was reading Miles' notes. He's so unserious lmao- behold... My favorite note of his ✨

~ Enjoy chatting!
